text: Here's what science actually says about creatine in muscles. Creatine is a compound found in our muscles. It fuels high-intensity exercise, but how does it really work? When you supplement with creatine, it increases muscle creatine stores, boosting your workout performance. But there's more! Research shows it can enhance muscle growth and improve recovery. However, some studies are still in preliminary stages. So, while creatine is backed by science, it’s essential to use it wisely and stay informed on ongoing research. Want more science insights? Like and follow for more fascinating discoveries!
